questions.q: In which host city did Spain face Argentina?
questions.explain: The match was played in New York/New Jersey (East Rutherford).

questions.q: How many teams are competing at the 2026 World Cup?
Which three nations are co-hosting the 2026 World Cup?
questions.explain: It is the first World Cup hosted by three countries.

questions.q: Where is the 2026 World Cup final being held (July 19)?
questions.explain: The final is at MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, NJ.

questions.q: How many matches are played across the whole 2026 tournament?
